records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I've been in situations like this before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I've been in situations like this before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I've been in situations like this before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fully familiar with the necessary procedures. So we can skip the explanations and get started.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fully familiar with the necessary procedures. So we can skip the explanations and get started.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fully familiar with the necessary procedures. So we can skip the explanations and get started.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You say I can speak casually, like before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You say I can speak casually, like before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You say I can speak casually, like before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm afraid I can't do that. As the Captain of the Order, it would be improper of me to speak informally you, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm afraid I can't do that. As the Captain of the Order, it would be improper of me to speak informally you, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm afraid I can't do that. As the Captain of the Order, it would be improper of me to speak informally you, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I, as the Captain, were to act without formality, it might even cause you some trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I, as the Captain, were to act without formality, it might even cause you some trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I, as the Captain, were to act without formality, it might even cause you some trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want to make a contract not with the Captain of the Zodiac Knights, but with me, as an individual knight...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want to make a contract not with the Captain of the Zodiac Knights, but with me, as an individual knight...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want to make a contract not with the Captain of the Zodiac Knights, but with me, as an individual knight...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really are unusual. Most people only ever demanded that I fulfill my duties as Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really are unusual. Most people only ever demanded that I fulfill my duties as Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really are unusual. Most people only ever demanded that I fulfill my duties as Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those who didn't were fellow knights. Or...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those who didn't were fellow knights. Or...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those who didn't were fellow knights. Or...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive me. It seems I ended up questioning your sincerity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive me. It seems I ended up questioning your sincerity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive me. It seems I ended up questioning your sincerity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if this contract came first, I know you're someone I can trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if this contract came first, I know you're someone I can trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if this contract came first, I know you're someone I can trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It still feels a little awkward, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It still feels a little awkward, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It still feels a little awkward, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to forge a bond with me, then I too must stand ready, as a knight should.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish to forge a bond with me, then I too must stand ready, as a knight should.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to forge a bond with me, then I too must stand ready, as a knight should.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo, pledge my oath here and now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo, pledge my oath here and now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo, pledge my oath here and now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From this moment on, my sword and my very being belongs solely to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From this moment on, my sword and my very being belongs solely to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From this moment on, my sword and my very being belongs solely to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what dangers may lie ahead, I shall become your guiding starlight, shining through the darkness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what dangers may lie ahead, I shall become your guiding starlight, shining through the darkness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what dangers may lie ahead, I shall become your guiding starlight, shining through the darkness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if it's possible... I hope you'll be my star and shine upon me as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if it's possible... I hope you'll be my star and shine upon me as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if it's possible... I hope you'll be my star and shine upon me as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can be a bit clingy at times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can be a bit clingy at times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can be a bit clingy at times.
